topLevelInterfaceRows.rebuildObligation: Model UnitAI registry creation, value-list loading, selected behaviour/sound/movement scalar fields, and unselected value-id debt separately; runtime AI behavior remains deferred.
Model weapon registry rows, icon/consumption/charge-level selected fields, and unselected weapon ids without claiming runtime firing behavior.
Model weapon-mode round/effect/sound/volley/launch-angle rows as static interface fields; runtime fire cadence and projectile outcomes remain deferred.
Model selected round effect/explosion/grid/mesh fields while preserving the large unselected observed id set as explicit remaining semantic debt.
Model spawner unit/timing/range/based-on/static squad fields as a bounded interface; runtime spawn timing and AI behavior remain deferred.
Model the fully selected observed explosion field set first for deterministic fixture work; runtime effects, audio, and damage behavior remain deferred.
Model component mesh/noise/vent/flag/indexed-scalar rows while preserving factory-only and unselected observed ids as separate boundaries.
Model feature mesh/texture/noise/flag rows with factory-only rows explicit; runtime terrain/material behavior remains deferred.
Model the small hazard scalar/effect/noise interface with its one factory-only row explicit; runtime hazard behavior remains deferred.

payloadInterface.stringLengthBoundary: shape-only printable ASCII body plus terminal NUL; raw copied strings are not published
payloadInterface.rawPreservedBoundary: raw-preserved-other payloads remain length-preserved, not semantically decoded

nested child value families for seek/behaviour/alligence/navmap/state-style rows

by-name source/default record copy into target record
by-name registry lookup for PhysicsScript record families

claimBoundary.summary: Static PhysicsScript rebuild interface vocabulary only.
proves: The parser, semantic ledger, scalar/string fixture, and value-id crosswalk can be referenced as one rebuild-facing PhysicsScript interface vocabulary.
Nine top-level PhysicsScript families have stable public-safe counts and interface obligations.
Eighty-seven selected value-id rows retain factory/apply/registry anchors and selected field names.
Unselected observed value ids and factory-only selected rows remain visible boundaries.
doesNotProve: complete value-id semantics for all 185 observed statement/value pairs
